home.tagline: A per-user Tasks app. Create an account or sign in to reach your dashboard.
home.body: Auth and the database foundation are wired up with Better Auth and Drizzle (libSQL). The protected dashboard proves server-side auth gating.
home.title: Shipwright

cookies.message: {app} uses strictly necessary cookies to run, and optional cookies (e.g. analytics) only with your consent. See our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Sign in to your account with your email and password.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.description: Sign up with your email and a password to get started.
signUp.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link is on its way — check your inbox.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.error: Couldn't reset your password. Try the link again.

addTask.heading: Add a task
addTask.description: Capture something you need to get done.
addTask.label: Task title
addTask.errorTooLong: Title must be at most {max} characters.
addTask.errorRateLimit: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.

tasks.heading: Your tasks
tasks.emptyMessage: Add your first task using the form above.

billing.heading: Billing
billing.descriptionPro: You're on the Pro plan. Thanks for your support!
billing.descriptionFree: Upgrade to Pro to support development.
billing.checkoutSuccess: Payment received — your Pro access activates momentarily.
billing.checkoutCancelled: Checkout cancelled — no charge was made.
billing.checkoutError: We couldn't start checkout. Please try again.
billing.portalError: We couldn't open the billing portal. Please try again.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.descriptionEnabled: Enable web push to get notified on this device.
notifications.configNote: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY and VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY to enable web push.
notifications.errorEnable: Couldn't enable notifications (permission denied or unsupported).
notifications.errorEnableRetry: Couldn't enable notifications. Please try again.
notifications.errorDisable: Couldn't disable notifications. Please try again.
notifications.errorTest: Couldn't send the test notification. Please try again.

files.heading: Files
files.emptyMessage: Upload your first file using the button above.
files.configNote: Set S3_ENDPOINT, S3_REGION, S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID, S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY and S3_BUCKET to enable file uploads.
files.errorRateLimit: Too many uploads — try again in a minute.

trpc.heading: Tasks (via tRPC)
trpc.description: Read through the @repo/api tRPC client (opt-in, alongside Server Actions).

profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: How you appear across the app.
profile.errorValidation: Please enter a name (at most {max} characters).

password.heading: Password
password.description: Changing your password signs you out everywhere else.
password.errorEmpty: Please fill in both password fields.
password.errorTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

sessions.heading: Sessions
sessions.description: Where your account is signed in.

danger.heading: Delete account
danger.description: Permanently removes your account, tasks, files, push subscriptions, and cancels any active subscription. This cannot be undone.
danger.errorEmpty: Please enter your password to confirm deletion.
danger.errorRateLimit: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.

unexpected.title: Something went wrong
unexpected.message: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.message: This page isn't available without a connection. Reconnect and try again — your previously loaded pages still work.
